title: October 16
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 16''' is the 289th day of the year (290th in leap years). There are 76 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1923|1923]] – [[The Walt Disney Company]] is founded.
*[[1920s#1924|1924]] – [[Alan Hume]] is born.
*[[1920s#1926|1926]] – [[Joe Sinnott]] is born.
*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[Guy Siner]] is born.
*[[1960s#1966|1966]] – [[Mary Elizabeth McGlynn]] is born.
*[[1960s#1966|1967]] – [[Sandi Finlay]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Todd Stashwick]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[Nelson Lee]] is born.
*[[1984]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 91|''Star Wars'' 91]] published.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars Gamer 7|''Star Wars Gamer'' 7]] shipped to subscribers.
*[[2002]] – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 42]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – [[Jedipedia]] (German Star Wars Wiki) is founded.
*[[2006]] – ''[[Rookies: No Turning Back]]'' [[Webstrips|webstrip]] concludes.
*[[2007]] – [[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] is published.
*[[2009]] – "[[Senate Spy]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2017]] – ''[[Star Wars Rebels: Heroes of Mandalore]]'', the [[Star Wars Rebels Season Four|Season Four]] premiere of ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]'', airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2019]] – [[Allegiance 2|''Allegiance'' 2]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Adventures: Return to Vader's Castle 3|''Star Wars Adventures: Return to Vader's Castle'' 3]] published.
*[[2020]] – [[Naboo (booklet)|''Naboo'']] published in French.
*[[2024]] – [[Battle of Jakku — Insurgency Rising 2|''Battle of Jakku — Insurgency Rising'' 2]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[Dark Legends (audiobook)|''Dark Legends'' audiobook]] released.
